user.title: Set up Climate Relay
user.description: Create the initial configuration entry for the integration.

init.title: Global Settings
init.description: Configure the integration-wide defaults for presence control and diagnostics. If you enable a daily override reset, Home Assistant will ask for the reset time in a second step.

data_description.person_entity_ids: Used to resolve automatic home or away presence when Presence Control is set to Automatic.
data_description.unknown_state_handling: Choose whether unknown or unavailable tracked entities should be treated as home or away.
data_description.fallback_temperature: Fallback target temperature reserved for later failure-handling and room-control slices.
data_description.manual_override_reset_enabled: Enable a daily reset point for manual overrides once area-level overrides are available.
data_description.manual_override_reset_time: Only required when the daily override reset is enabled.
data_description.simulation_mode: Evaluate control behavior and log decisions without sending future actuator writes.
data_description.verbose_logging: Add more detailed diagnostic log output for troubleshooting.

reset_time.title: Daily Override Reset
reset_time.description: Choose the daily time at which manual overrides should reset. The other changes from the previous step are still pending. Closing this step cancels the current Global Settings changes.

data_description.manual_override_reset_time: Required because daily override reset is enabled.

room.title: Regulation Profile
room.description: Configure the first primary-climate-anchored control surface for Climate Relay.

data_description.primary_climate_entity_id: Required source climate entity. Its Home Assistant area is reused for Climate Relay placement.
data_description.window_entity_id: Optional window-contact source for area automation.
data_description.window_action_type: Climate action applied after the configured window delay while the contact remains open.
data_description.window_open_delay_seconds: Seconds the window contact must stay open before open-window automation activates.
data_description.home_target_temperature: Target temperature used when the effective presence is home.
data_description.away_target_type: Choose whether the away target is absolute or relative to the home target.
data_description.away_target_temperature: Absolute away temperature or relative delta, depending on the selected away target type.
data_description.schedule_home_start: Daily local time when the profile starts using the home target while presence is home.
data_description.schedule_home_end: Daily local time when the profile returns to the away target.

window_custom_temperature.title: Open-window Action: Custom Temperature
window_custom_temperature.description: Set the custom temperature required because Open-window action is set to Use custom temperature. The other Regulation Profile changes are still pending. Closing this step cancels the current Regulation Profile changes.

data_description.window_custom_temperature: Required because Open-window action is set to Use custom temperature.

error.person_entities_required: Select at least one tracked presence entity.
error.reset_time_required: This field is required when the daily override reset is enabled.
error.primary_climate_required: Select exactly one primary climate entity.
error.primary_climate_area_required: Assign the primary climate entity to a Home Assistant area first.
error.schedule_window_required: Choose different start and end times for the daily home schedule.
error.window_custom_temperature_required: Set the custom temperature for the selected open-window action.
error.window_custom_temperature_range: Choose a custom temperature between 5 and 35 °C.
